Operation 'sendMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in return.

data.current_description: Send a single SMS or MMS message to a recipient
data.description_suggestion: Send a single SMS or MMS message to a recipient. Accepts a MessageRequest object containing recipient phone number, message content, optional attachments, and scheduling parameters. Returns a MessageResponse with the message ID, status, and timestamp. Messages are queued for immediate or scheduled delivery based on request parameters.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Added details about expected inputs (MessageRequest schema), outputs (MessageResponse with specific fields), and side effects (message queuing for delivery). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in return.

message: Operation 'sendBulkMessages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary improved for clarity and specificity. Description expanded to clarify input format (array of messages), output (job ID), and the asynchronous workflow including how to track progress. This enables AI agents to understand the bulk operation pattern and know they need to poll job status.

data.current_description: Create up to 100 messages in a single request for asynchronous processing
data.description_suggestion: Create up to 100 SMS or MMS messages in a single request for asynchronous processing. Accepts an array of message objects with recipient phone numbers, content, and optional attachments. Returns a job ID for tracking bulk operation progress. Messages are queued and processed asynchronously; use the job ID with getJobStatus to monitor completion and retrieve results.
data.reasoning: Summary improved for clarity and specificity. Description expanded to clarify input format (array of messages), output (job ID), and the asynchronous workflow including how to track progress. This enables AI agents to understand the bulk operation pattern and know they need to poll job status.

message: Operation 'getJobStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks details about what information is returned and the relationship to sendBulkMessages. Added context about job ID source, specific status values, and return information. This helps AI agents understand the complete bulk messaging workflow and what data they'll receive at different job stages.

data.current_description: Monitor the status and results of a bulk message creation job
data.description_suggestion: Monitor the status and results of a bulk message creation job. Accepts a job ID returned from sendBulkMessages. Returns job status (pending, processing, completed, failed), progress metrics, and upon completion, a summary of successfully sent messages and any failures. Use this operation to track asynchronous bulk message processing.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what information is returned and the relationship to sendBulkMessages. message: Operation 'lookupPhoneNumber' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary improved to be more specific about what is looked up (carrier and SMS availability). data.current_description: Look up carrier information and SMS availability for a phone number
data.summary_suggestion: Look up phone number carrier and SMS availability
data.description_suggestion: Look up carrier information and SMS availability for a phone number. Accepts a phone number parameter. Returns carrier name, country, SMS capability status, and number type (mobile/landline). Use this operation to verify SMS deliverability before sending messages or to gather carrier intelligence for routing decisions.
